summary: Regression verification after FarmerDashboard.jsx refactor (split into FarmerStats/FarmerListings/FarmerOrders/AddProductDialog + useFarmerData hook). Backend: 14/14 pytest cases pass. Frontend: full farmer dashboard E2E covered — login, stats render, listings filter, AddProductDialog with all 16 form testids, product create/list/delete round-trip, AI price-predict network call fired, buyer & admin login sanity. Zero console errors; only pre-existing Radix a11y warnings observed.

issues: Radix `DialogContent` missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` — 4 a11y console warnings. Pre-existing, not introduced by this refactor.

passed: Farmer-owned product filter by farmer_id → non-empty (seeded)
POST /api/products → product persisted, retrievable via GET
Farmer login UI → /dashboard/farmer with 3 StatCards visible (Active Listings / Orders Received / Total Revenue)
FarmerListings rendered 13 seeded listings; after AddProductDialog submit count = 14; after delete count back to 13

AddProductDialog opens; all 16 data-testids present: form-title, form-desc, form-category, form-grade, form-price, ai-predict-btn, form-unit, form-moq, form-qty, form-location, form-state, form-images, form-harvest, form-organic, form-export, form-submit
AI Predict button fires POST /api/ai/price-predict (verified via request interception)
Trash-icon delete with window.confirm → product removed from UI
Buyer login → /dashboard/buyer loads with no console errors
Admin login → /dashboard/admin loads with no console errors
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is clean. FarmerDashboard.jsx is now 30 lines of pure composition (good).
useFarmerData hook correctly memoizes `load` on userId and exposes `reload` — matches the contract used by sub-components.

FarmerListings.remove calls onChange() unconditionally even if api.delete throws (await without try/catch). Minor: a failed delete would still trigger a refetch & success toast. Low priority; not a regression.
AddProductDialog.aiPredict catches but swallows error to a generic toast — fine for UX. No regression.
Pre-existing: Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby — produces 4 console warnings across dialogs (not a regression but worth fixing for a11y).
test_credentials: Farmer: farmer@kisanbaazar.in/farmer123, Buyer: buyer@kisanbaazar.in/buyer123, Admin: admin@kisanbaazar.in/admin123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md)
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing idempotent seed. Test product 'E2E_Tomato_*' was created during UI flow and deleted in the same run, leaving DB clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FarmerDashboard refactor passed full regression. Reusable pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_farmer_regression.py covers auth + farmer dashboard data + product CRUD + AI predict. Frontend has full data-testid coverage on AddProductDialog form fields and listing/delete buttons. Admin dashboard shows 0/0/0 stats — pre-existing behaviour (admin stats endpoint may compute differently from /api/dashboard/stats); out of scope for this refactor.
